revision.comment: Replacing Flag_of_the_Vatican_City_(2023–present).svg with [[File:Flag_of_Vatican_City_(2023–present).svg]] (by [[commons:User:CommonsDelinker|CommonsDelinker]] because: [[:c:COM:FR|File renamed]]: [[:c:COM:FR#FR4|Criterion 4]] (harmonizing names of file
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Vatican City | flag alias = Flag of Vatican City (2023–present).svg | flag alias-2001 = Flag of Vatican City (2001–2023).svg | flag alias-army = SwissGuardFlag-Generique.png | link alias-army = Pontifical Swiss Guard | size = {{{size|}}} | size flag alias = 23x16px | size flag alias-army = 23x16px | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 2001 | redir1 = VAT | related1 = Holy See | related2 = Papal States </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n \n</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Vatican_City here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Vatican_City for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Vatican City | flag alias = Flag of Vatican City (2023–present).svg | flag alias-2001 = Flag of Vatican City (2001–2023).svg | flag alias-army = SwissGuardFlag-Generique.png | link alias-army = Pontifical Swiss Guard | size = {{{size|}}} | size flag alias = 23x16px | size flag alias-army = 23x16px | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 2001 | redir1 = VAT | related1 = Holy See | related2 = Papal States </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
